description.value: Keyword: [Hindered] Effect: If your effective carried weight exceeds Str × 15 lbs, your movement speed reduced by 20 feet (minimum 5 feet). Add 2 to both dice on Athletics and Acrobatics checks. Add 1 to both dice on all other Agility-based skill checks. Cannot use the Disengage action. Cannot Jump. Recovery: Reduce effective carried weight to Str × 15 lbs or below.
